---
applyTo: "**/*.ts,**/*.tsx,**/*.js,**/*.jsx"
description: "Code review standards and GitHub review guidelines."
---

# Code Review Standards

- Enforce lint, type-check, and test gates before merging
- Review for code clarity, maintainability, and security
- Ensure all new code follows project standards
- Use GitHub PR reviews for all merges
- Request changes for missing tests or documentation
